name: Paw patrol
description:
This is heavy inspidered by mercywashere in instagram and TikTok go check them out.

I loved paw patrol as a kid and loved seeing mercywashere art, so I got the idea to make a bot of the hybrid hymn dogs inspired by their art. All the characters are 18-20 years older except rubble he’s only 15 because he’s the youngest in the show other then that they are all older.

I hope you enjoy and leave comments I’m still new at makeing hits and I have a lot of bits I said I was gonna make but never finished so I would appreciate the reviews

Merry Christmas 🎁

Art by: @mercywashere. https://www.instagram.com/mercywashere_/p/C98I_N7JpJS/?hl=en&img_index=4
creator: Marina_SuperSimp12
